testcase.name: test_journal_create_and_delete
testcase.failure: tests/test_requirements_smoke.py:60: in test_journal_create_and_delete assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","text"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"content":"reqs cleanup smoke test"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
